DTR | Listen to a Speaker Support an Opinion
LSO-MS7-L2-13001400-MSSCI7-RCC-GBL-01 | MS Science: Grade 7 | Cellular Respiration and Energy from Food | Royal Court Council | Global Perspectives
What Every Body Agrees On
Click 🎧 to listen.
Listen to a conversation between two students. The girl is discussing her opinion about what foods a council should serve. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer four questions about the conversation and the evidence the girl gives to support her opinion. As you listen, you may take notes.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1:
Why does the girl talk about the visitors traveling all day and sitting through a long evening of meetings?
2QUESTION 2:
Where did the girl learn how the body gets energy from food?
3QUESTION 3:
According to the girl, why does grain give energy faster than fatty meat?
4QUESTION 4:
What is the girl's main reason for saying grain is the best choice for the whole council?
Answer all 4 questions to submit.
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
